name: Cut Duration
description: Считает суммарную длительность по кадрам в таблице
code: javascript:(async function(){var ex=document.getElementById('__cdm__');if(ex){ex.remove();return;}function wait(ms){return new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,ms);});}function detectTheme(){var bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'rgb(255,255,255)';var rgb=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[255,255,255];var y=0.2126*rgb[0]+0.7152*rgb[1]+0.0722*rgb[2];return y<128?'dark':'light';}function getScroller(){var c=document.querySelector('.react-grid-Canvas');if(c)return c;var v=document.querySelector('.react-grid-Viewport');if(v)return v;return document.scrollingElement||document.documentElement;}var seen={};function take(){document.querySelectorAll('.react-grid-Row').forEach(function(row){var cells=row.querySelectorAll('.react-grid-Cell');var nameVal='';cells.forEach(function(c){var v=c.getAttribute('value')||'';if(v&&v.indexOf('sq')>=0&&nameVal==='')nameVal=v;});if(!nameVal)return;if(seen[nameVal]!==undefined)return;cells.forEach(function(c){var v=c.getAttribute('value')||'';var n=parseInt(v);if(!isNaN(n)&&n>=0&&n<9999){seen[nameVal]=n;}});});}function slide(sc,dir){return new Promise(function(res){var speed=1200;function f(){var edge=sc.scrollHeight-sc.clientHeight;var atEnd=dir>0?sc.scrollTop>=edge-1:sc.scrollTop<=1;sc.scrollTop=dir>0?Math.min(sc.scrollTop+speed,edge):Math.max(sc.scrollTop-speed,0);take();if(atEnd)return res();requestAnimationFrame(f);}requestAnimationFrame(f);});}var sc=getScroller();sc.scrollTop=0;await wait(300);take();await slide(sc,+1);await slide(sc,-1);take();var vals=Object.values(seen);var sum=vals.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0);var count=vals.length;var theme=detectTheme();var isDark=theme==='dark';var colors={bg:isDark?'#2f2f30':'#fff',card:isDark?'#2a2b30':'#fbfbfd',border:isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,.1)':'#ddd',text:isDark?'#e9e9ec':'#222',muted:isDark?'#b9b9c2':'#999',hint:isDark?'#888':'#bbb',btn:isDark?'#3a3b40':'#f0f0f0',btnText:isDark?'#e9e9ec':'#333'};function showModal(inSec){var val=inSec?(Math.round(sum/60*100)/100):sum;var unit=inSec?'минут':'кадров';var btnLabel=inSec?'В кадры':'В минуты';var m=document.createElement('div');m.id='__cdm__';m.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:80px;right:30px;z-index:99999;background:'+colors.bg+';border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:10px;padding:18px 20px;min-width:240px;max-width:280px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,'+(isDark?'0.4':'0.12')+');font-family:sans-serif;color:'+colors.text+';';var hd=document.createElement('div');hd.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;';var sp=document.createElement('span');sp.style.cssText='font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:'+colors.text+';';sp.textContent='Cut Duration';var cl=document.createElement('button');cl.style.cssText='background:none;border:none;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;color:'+colors.muted+';padding:0;line-height:1;';cl.textContent='x';cl.addEventListener('click',function(){document.getElementById('__cdm__').remove();});hd.appendChild(sp);hd.appendChild(cl);var fd=document.createElement('div');fd.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:'+colors.muted+';margin-bottom:2px;';fd.textContent='Значений найдено: '+count;var nd=document.createElement('div');nd.style.cssText='font-size:30px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:2px;color:'+colors.text+';';nd.textContent=val;var lb=document.createElement('div');lb.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:'+colors.hint+';margin-bottom:14px;';lb.textContent=unit;var bt=document.createElement('div');bt.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:8px;';var cp=document.createElement('button');cp.style.cssText='flex:1;padding:7px 0;border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:7px;background:'+colors.btn+';cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:'+colors.btnText+';';cp.textContent='Копировать';cp.addEventListener('click',function(){var ta=document.createElement('textarea');ta.value=String(val);ta.style.cssText='position:fixed;opacity:0;';document.body.appendChild(ta);ta.focus();ta.select();try{document.execCommand('copy');}catch(e){}document.body.removeChild(ta);cp.textContent='Скопировано!';setTimeout(function(){cp.textContent='Копировать';},1500);});var cv=document.createElement('button');cv.style.cssText='flex:1;padding:7px 0;border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:7px;background:'+colors.btn+';cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:'+colors.btnText+';';cv.textContent=btnLabel;cv.addEventListener('click',function(){document.getElementById('__cdm__').remove();showModal(!inSec);});bt.appendChild(cp);bt.appendChild(cv);m.appendChild(hd);m.appendChild(fd);m.appendChild(nd);m.appendChild(lb);m.appendChild(bt);document.body.appendChild(m);}showModal(false);})()

name: Dashboard
description: Дашборд задач по статусам с фильтрами
code: javascript:(async function(){function T(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim()}function L(s){return T(s).toLowerCase()}function Q(q,r){return Array.from((r||document).querySelectorAll(q))}function hdr(){let h=Q('.react-grid-HeaderCell');if(!h.length)h=Q('thead th,[role=columnheader]');return{names:h.map(e=>T(e.innerText||e.textContent)),left:h.map(e=>parseFloat((e.getAttribute('style')||'').match(/left:\s*([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]||'0'))}}function rows(){let r=Q('.react-grid-Row');if(r.length)return r;let tb=Q('tbody tr');if(tb.length)return tb;return[]}function sleft(c){return c.slice().sort((a,b)=>parseFloat((a.getAttribute('style')||'').match(/left:\s*([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]||'0')-parseFloat((b.getAttribute('style')||'').match(/left:\s*([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]||'0'))}function byLeft(c,left){let best=null,bd=1e9;for(const el of c){let v=parseFloat((el.getAttribute('style')||'').match(/left:\s*([\d.]+)/i)?.[1]||'0');let d=Math.abs(v-left);if(d<bd){bd=d;best=el}}return best}function getScroller(){let c=document.querySelector('.react-grid-Canvas');if(c&&c.scrollHeight>c.clientHeight)return c;if(c&&c.parentElement&&c.parentElement.scrollHeight>c.parentElement.clientHeight)return c.parentElement;let v=document.querySelector('.react-grid-Viewport');if(v&&v.scrollHeight>v.clientHeight)return v;let r=document.querySelector('.react-grid-Row');if(r){let p=r.parentElement;while(p&&p!==document.body){if(p.scrollHeight>p.clientHeight+5)return p;p=p.parentElement}}return document.scrollingElement||document.documentElement}function stIn(txt){txt=L(txt);let m=txt.match(/\b(wtg|rdy|ip|rev|rdf|fin|cbb|hld|omt)\b/);return m?m[1]:''}function stFrom(cell){if(!cell)return'';let t=T(cell.innerText||cell.textContent),s=stIn(t);if(s)return s;let sub=Q('span,div,b,i,em',cell).map(n=>n.innerText||n.textContent).join(' ');return stIn(sub)}function readVar(n){return(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue(n)||'').trim()}function detectTheme(){let bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'rgb(255,255,255)';let rgb=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[255,255,255];let y=0.2126*rgb[0]+0.7152*rgb[1]+0.0722*rgb[2];return y<200?'dark':'light'}const COLORS={wtg:'#BDBDBD',rdy:'#2F80ED',ip:'#C8E6A3',rev:'#F2C94C',rdf:'#EB5757',fin:'#219653',cbb:'#00B3B3',hld:'#9E9E9E',omt:'#636363'};const ORDER_STAT=['wtg','rdy','ip','rev','rdf','fin','cbb','hld','omt'];const theme=detectTheme();alert('Dashboard script loaded - theme: '+theme);})()
